hotel_name: Canary Nha Trang hotel (Canary Nha Trang Hotel)

reviews.title: Horrible staff service
reviews.text: We arrived middle of the night and the staff were extremely rude. I understand if they didn’t speak English but they didn’t even try to communicate even through translate. Did not let us check in and made us leave at midnight. Even threatened to call the cops on us if we didn’t leave even though we just wanted to check in.

reviews.title: Totally waste of money
reviews.negatives: Room was dirty, there was a thief staying in the hotel and stole my girlfriend's rain jacket. Hotel front desk couldn't do anything about it. Garage was always full and hard to get my bike out of it.

reviews.title: The hotel is terrible from the attitude of the staff to the way the rooms are cleaned, and it's somehow rated 3 stars???
reviews.text: I booked through AGD and the information here states that check-out is until 12:30, but I checked out at 12:33. The receptionist said I would be charged an extra 50k and then just pointed to the hotel regulations, saying that I didn't understand the rules about late check-out, with a really bad attitude. After some back and forth, they finally said to pay attention to the time next time as I'm likely not coming back to this hotel. I thought I could stay for free and just leave, but the attitude was unacceptable. The storage room for other guests' refrigerators was left with forgotten items, and they didn't clean or check that. Furthermore, around 9:30 AM while I was sleeping, a staff member opened the door to clean using the hotel key card without permission. What is that all about? I didn't request to have my room cleaned and it wasn't even check-out time yet; why would they barge in like that? It's extremely rude not to knock and ask if a guest is in the room or not. This is a three-star hotel with such poor service? What if there are no guests in the room and the staff cleans without informing; if personal belongings go missing, who takes responsibility? Given the price I booked at, I suggest everyone consider other hotels because this place will just add frustration with the rude receptionist and the unprofessional housekeeping staff.
reviews.room_type: Economy Double Room with King Bed and without Window

reviews.title: Disappointing Experience
reviews.positives: Spacious
reviews.negatives: This hotel is poorly managed. I booked a specific room, but due to an issue, I was forced to switch to a different room that I didn’t want—yet I was still charged the same price (they say it’s cost more but because it has another bed and for me its less valuable). The room had a unpleasant smell coming from the bathroom, at night the noise from children running in the room above the was constant and disruptive and the WiFi was completely nonfunctional. Overall, a disappointing stay.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Nhân viên buồng phòng thái độ rất tệ.  Đợi cả tiếng đồng hồ lên nhận phòng. Mệt mỏi tưởng được nhận phòng nghỉ ngơi nhưng chúng tôi đã không thể lưu trú lại.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The place is quit good but they didn’t clean the room
reviews.negatives: The room service is quit average !

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: No pool, no fitness centre, paid for breakfast but they told us they didn’t do breakfast. Had to change rooms twice because of smell from the mini fridge, location was somewhat ok being close to the beach, but completely out of the way and far from everything else. The staff tried their best so I can’t be too upset with them, there was a slight language barrier but that’s to be expected - it just made asking for facilities that are advertised more difficult since they don’t exist.
reviews.room_type: Economy Double Room with King Bed and without Window

reviews.title: Shocking customer service
reviews.text:
Couldn't sleep . No curtain and light from hall kept me awake.
No help from staff in making a transfer booking or help in where to find a power charger for phone

reviews.room_type: Economy Double Room with King Bed and without Window

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.title: Not as decent as photos
reviews.text: Location is near the beach. Staffs are nice. Stuffs are old, and one of the bed (two-bed room) blanket had stain and dust under. Stayed for just 1 night and the price is okay.
reviews.room_type: Economy Double Room with King Bed and without Window

reviews.title: Nice Receptionist, Horrible WiFi
reviews.positives: Receptionist was nice. Although her English level is limited, she tried to help me solve my problems. The location isn't the best, but convenience stores are nearby. The view from the room is spectacular.
reviews.negatives: WiFi is terrible here. I had to go to a coffee shop to complete an assignment because the WiFi here is so bad. Due to bad WiFi, the internet TV is useless. I complained, and the manager had a maintenance man (father, uncle, brother, or son) 'look at it'. Made the problem worse, IMO. Bed is also hard, and breakfast was not worth the extra money that you pay--not at all. The hotel is next to a school, so you hear the loudspeakers in the morning. That and the sunlight that seeps through the curtains prevented me from sleeping. I regretted coming here because although I bought the most expensive room,  there are better hotels for a cheaper price.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: :) I cleaned the room, but when we arrived, there was still a condom. Oh my. But the room has a window, is bright, but the building is a bit old.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The view of our corner room on 14th fl is great to see both the mountain and the sea. Within a walking distance to some restaurants and cafe near the beach.
reviews.negatives: Desk lamp and light in the bathroom were unusable so the room was a bit dark.

reviews.title: Share experiences
reviews.text: Although booked last minute for 2 nights during the National Day holiday in Vietnam, the room price was quite affordable, convenient, and clean. It is especially located next to the school of the teacher who previously guided my master's degree graduation! Wonderful.

reviews.title: Please review the price.
reviews.text: I request a review of the price. I booked a room that includes breakfast and have already paid for it. Upon check-in, the receptionist said the program is over and forgot to include it on Agoda. Since I have already paid, please check again, Agoda. Do not deceive customers like this.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: We loved our stay here because it was quite part of Nha Trang with local prices in restaurants/coffee shops and no overpriced tourist prices. We will come back again.
reviews.negatives: We extended our stay for one more week so in total we stayed for two weeks. In those two weeks, they didn't change the sheets at all. The room was cleaned and the bed was made but the sheets were never changed.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.text: The Canary Hotel is really nice. The view from the room was beautiful. All the amenities were there except swimming pool. I think Agoda has wrongly mentioned that this property has a swimming pool. Apart from this, my stay was excellent.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Großes Zimmer mit Zimmerupgrade
Sauber
Bett bequem
Konnte selbst entscheiden über Reinigung
Schöner Ausblick
In 10 min zu Fuß am Strand
reviews.negatives:
Frühstück nicht wie auf den Bilder, man wählt von einer Karte aus und es wird einen aufs Zimmer gebracht. Menge war ausreichend, Obst wäre schön gewesen

Das Zimmer hatte viele Fenster, durch welche bis zum späten Nachmittag die Sonne schien, es war es warm im Zimmer, die Klimaanlage hat es erst nach 2h geschafft es einigermaßen zu klimatisieren. 

Personal spricht sehr schlecht englisch. Verständigung hauptsächlich mit Übersetzer

Lage ist okay, aber etwas abseits

reviews.title: Comfy hotel with clean air conditioner
reviews.text:
We booked the chiepest rooms without window here several times and almost every time were given a better room with a window.
They cleaned the room every day and replenished all the amenities.
Good location with the best marked in the city nearby. The beach is a walking distance, too. There is a great coffee shop with the best hot egg coffee in Vietnam just around the corner.

reviews.negatives: Beetje ver van het centrum maar in dit buurtje zaten ook leuke restaurantjes.

reviews.title: The hotel is quite clean, and the staff is friendly.
reviews.text: The location is easy to find, spacious, and convenient. The elevator is stable. The room and bed sheets are quite clean. The staff is very friendly, well-prepared, and the check-in is quick. The owner is also enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Clean, friendly, budget
reviews.text: We stayed here more than once. Recommended! There is a small parking inside the building for motorbikes and bicycles.

reviews.title: Cực kỳ thất vọng, sẽ không bao giờ đến lại lần 2
reviews.negatives:
Tôi thực sự rất bực bội về cách xử lý tình huống của khách sạn. Vì có việc đột xuất nên chúng tôi đến khách sạn lúc 12h trưa. Khách sạn báo là đã có khách trả phòng và buồng phòng đang dọn dẹp. Nhưng mãi đến tận 14h, khách sạn mới giao chìa khóa để tôi vào phòng. Tôi thực sự cực kỳ thất vọng luôn. Có buồng phòng nào dọn căn phòng 50m2 mà cần đến cả 2 tiếng ko???
Thậm chí, tôi đến 12h, hỏi ko còn phòng nào khác hay sao. Khách sạn bảo khăng khăng là ko còn. Nhưng có những vị khách chỉ đến sau 15 - 30ph thì được vào nhận phòng ngay???? Rõ ràng là còn phòng nhưng lại ko giao phòng và bắt tôi phải đợi cả 2 tiếng. 
Có rất nhiều cách giải quyết như là giao phòng đang trống nhưng đề xuất mức giá giao dịch khác, có thể yêu cầu buồng phòng dọn dẹp trước phòng của tôi rồi dọn phòng khác sau. Lúc đó, chỉ có tôi và chị là phải ngồi chờ và chẳng có ai khác chờ, cần ưu tiên hơn cả. Tại sao lại xử lý một cách kém hiệu quả và gây phản cảm cho khách hàng như vậy???
Đây là khách sạn phục vụ tệ nhất mà tôi từng ở khi đến Nha Trang. Cực kỳ thất vọng khi khách sạn làm việc như vậy mà được quá nhiều người đánh giá cao.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is super nice and the price is reasonable, the staff are always 10,000 points. The only downside is that the air conditioning is a bit weak, probably because I don't know how to turn it on; overall, I'm really satisfied.

reviews.title: A nice clean and comfy room
reviews.text: We lived here last year and came back this year. The hotel still offers one of the best deals in the area to book online. The rooms are clean and consistently cleaned every day with the towels being changed and amenities refilled. The stuff members at the reception are nice and helpful. There is a parking for bikes inside the building. And they seem to always try to give you an upgraded room compared to your booking if it is available. We booked the cheapest one (without a window) but here given one with the window.

reviews.title: Thái độ phục vụ rất tệ, sẽ không quay lại
reviews.positives: Giường rộng
reviews.negatives: Đặt phòng dịp lễ nên mặc dù booking k yêu cầu thanh toán nhưng ks đã nhắn riêng để cọc phòng, trước giờ nhận phòng không có nhân viên gọi xác nhận, mặc dù đến nhận phòng lúc 14h25 nhưng lễ tân báo chưa có phòng (không hề gọi khách để thông báo) và phải đợi đến gần 15h30 mới có phòng. Đi đường xa có trẻ nhỏ đến giờ đó rất mệt cần đc nghỉ ngơi nhưng lễ tân báo chưa có phòng để nhận với thái độ rất thờ ơ và rất hời hợt, k hề đứng dậy chào hay có thái độ muốn xin lỗi khách hàng. Thái độ phục vụ của khách sạn rất tệ

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Chỗ đẹp , sạch sẽ và đẹp

reviews.title: Cerca de la playa
reviews.text:
Excelente opción si quieres estar cerca de la playa, sin embargo esta muy cerca de una escuela y escuchas todo. SIN EMBARGO, el personal es muy amable, gentil, dispuesto a ayudarte, la limpieza es excepcional y te atienden siempre

Personal muy amable

reviews.title: Tất cả sẽ càng tốt hơn nữa nếu bên mình sữa những điều trên.
reviews.negatives:
Tivi thì  rất khó để bấm, chọn những chương trình yêu thích cũng khó. Gặp người không thạo công nghệ sẽ rất cọc. 
Wifi thì yếu hết chỗ nói, không thể nào dùng được, kéo theo Tivi không hoạt động nốt. 
Bảo vệ thì nết đúng ngộ, vô để nghỉ ngơi, thư giãn mà nghe bảo vệ càm ràm rồi nói chuyện thiếu tôn trọng

reviews.title: Tạm được
reviews.positives: sạch sẽ, phòng không rộng nhưng đủ tiện nghi
reviews.negatives:
Nhân viên không thân thiện.
Lễ tân không hề cười với khách. Mặt mày khó chịu
Nhân viên bảo vệ không giúp đỡ khách. lúc mình tới có rất nhiều hành lí, mình đã hỏi chú bảo vệ xem có thang máy lên sảnh lễ tân không thì chú bảo không có. Mình hỏi lại mấy lần vì dưới trệt là hầm để xe. Chú nhất quyết bắt mình vác đồ đi thang bộ. Sáng hôm sau mình đi thang máy thì xuống được hầm. Ơ kìa?
Mặc dù phòng ốc vị trí ok nhưng nhân viên như thế này chắc mình sẽ không quay lại.

reviews.title: Оооочень крутой отель.
reviews.text:
Уютно, чисто, обслуживание замечательное. Мало туристов в округе, практически одни местные. Тихий спокойный райончик. До общественного тренажерного зала и бассейна 5 минут ходьбы (прилагается к отелю). Вкусно кормят. Нам очень понравилось!

— Вайфай еле ловил в нашем номере. На рецепшене неплохо. На наши жалобы реагировали, но проблему не решили. 
— Завтрак шведский стол, во сколько бы ты не пришёл, ничего нет, потому что китайцы сметали всё за доли секунды. Надо бы как-то продумать этом момент. Выставлять раз в пол часа тли час. Чтобы постояльцы могли знать когда лучше идти кушать.

reviews.title: Quá là tuyệt vời luôn.
reviews.positives: Chuyến đi này bọn mình đi 3 cặp book 3 phòng ở khsan thì tất cả đều hài lòng với chất lượng của khsan. Vị trí thuận lợi, gần biển, gần tạp hoá, gần bách hoá, nhà thuốc và xung quanh có nhiều quán cf xinh xịn để bọn mình check in rất okila. Phòng được dọn rất sạch khi mình nhận phòng, ánh sáng vào phòng rất tốt. Toàn thể nhân viên mình tiếp xúc trong quá trình lưu trú đều rất niềm nở. Nchung là tuyệt.
reviews.negatives: Không có.

reviews.title: Quá là tuyệt vời, Nha Trang xinh đẹp, con người thân thiện.
reviews.positives: Khách sạn gần biển, gần nhiều chỗ ăn ngon, gần cả những quán cf khá xinh và xịn, vị trí khá tốt. Phòng cũng mới, sạch, thơm nữa. Bạn nhân viên lễ tân nữ rất thân thiện, hoà đồng và hỗ trợ khách nhiệt tình. Chú bảo vệ cũng tốt nữa, bọn mình gặp vđề vào lúc nửa đêm cần phải ra ngoài mua thuốc, 2-3h sáng chú vẫn dậy nhiệt tình mở cửa và canh cửa và chỉ chỗ cho bọn mình ra ngoài mua thuốc. Mình ưng từ chất lượng phòng đến cả dịch vụ khách sạn mang đến, ưng cả thái độ của tất cả toàn thể nhân viên trong quá trình mình lưu trú. Mình chắc chắn sẽ quay lại. Cảm ơn vì đã làm cho chuyến đi của bọn mình rất tuyệt vời vì có một chỗ ở tốt ♥️.
reviews.negatives: Đương nhiên là không có điều gì không thích.

reviews.title: Отвратительно! Грязно тараканы. Персонал вымогает деньги, МОШЕННИКИ!
reviews.positives: Ничего!
reviews.negatives: Персонал мошенники!!!опаздала на полчаса с check out и стали вымогать деньги за день, угрожая вызвать милицию.учитывайте это при бронировании данного отеля. уборку не делают от слова совсем, кондиционер 90х еле работает, wife не работает персонал разводит руками. Куча дыр в номере из которых стоит выключить свет ползут тараканы!вода только кипяток! Рядом ничего нету. Закончилась вода, выйдя на лестницу стояла тележка уборщицы вытащила бутылочку так она выскочила из-за угла и накинулась, начала орать как ненормальная я думала полезет драться, будто я у нее тележку украла! И бесплатно сюда бы не вернулась!!!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Семейный номер с балконом довольно просторный.
Кондиционер работал исправно.
С балкона прекрасные виды.
На пару ночей отель подойдет.
В этом районе на пляже мало людей)
reviews.negatives:
Расположение.
Персонал не приветливый.
Огромная щель в двери. Плохая звукоизоляция, очень слышно что происходит в коридоре.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Красивый вид из окна прямо на горы, у нас была угловая комната, невысокая стоимость.
Девушка не ресепшн была очень отзывчивая.
reviews.negatives:
Номер был грязный, отодвинули занавески - были заляпанные руками окна.
Жесткий и неудобный матрас. 
Плохая звукоизоляция, хоть улочка и не с активным движением, но тем не менее окна не справлялись. 

Завтрак приносят в номер, нужно заранее договариваться что ты хочешь есть - но поднос очень грязный, даже не хочется его трогать. Вечером поднос не унесли, пока мы не попросили.

На стене плесень, крепление для душа было в плохом состоянии, душ все время разворачивало.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Выбирала по месторасположению, красивый вид из окна
reviews.negatives:
Номера были грязными, не было полотенец несколько раз просили принести, под кроватью между тумбочками был мусор (упаковка от презервативов) и это было очень неприятно, вода была холодная так же несколько раз просила уладить этот вопрос но меня проигнорировали 
Пои заселении принимали только наличную оплату ,qr нельзя было оплатить об этом надо предупреждать заранее

reviews.title: Персонал бы порасторопнее, дополнительные одеяла и подушки в номере и табличку на дверь с надписью «не беспокоить»
reviews.positives: Тишина и место расположения
reviews.negatives: Ужасно твёрдый диван и пришлось выторговывать второе одеяло, хотя нас было двое

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Отсутствие двухстворчатого шкафа. Некуда было повесить вещи.

reviews.title: Думаю, по хорошему, в скором времени надо косметический ремонт бы сделать.
reviews.positives: Было чисто, номер хорошо продувался. Кондиционером почти не пользовался. Правда рядом была школа, было не много шумно в некоторе время. Но, жил на 7 этаже, меня не коснулось.
reviews.negatives: За эти деньги, в пик сезона, цена качество норма.

reviews.title: Кроме воды  необходимо стики кофе и чая
reviews.positives: Расположение отеля
reviews.negatives: В номере не было кофе и чая,очень странный отель где нет  этого

reviews.title: Близкое расположение к пляжу и любимым кафе
reviews.positives: Приятный небольшой отель с удобным расположением около северного пляжа. Отличный отзывчивый персонал. Чистый небольшой номер с работающим кондиционером. Все туалетные принадлежности и постельное белье в наличии. Тенплая вода без перебоев. Есть сейф и холодильник. Рядом аптеки, минимаркет и кафешки\рестораны с приемлемыми ценами.
reviews.negatives: Душное маленькое фойе. Отсутствие возможности закрыть шторой окно, ведущее в коридор. Ночью свет из коридора попадал в номер.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
На пару дней номер отлмчный, но не больше. 
Туалет, душ - все отлично. Кровать, матрас, пастельное - без претензий. Каждый день меняли мусор, полотенца. 2 минибутылки воды. Маленький холодильник, телевизор, сейф
reviews.negatives:
Приехали в 6 утра. Да, в это время не заселяют, хотя Booking и обещал "раннее заселение". Когда на рецепшн пытался это объяснить, сказали ОК, заселим не в 14.00, а в 12.00.... Ну, не поспоришь, раньше))).... Хотя комната была свободна. 
По номеру вопросов нет, все отлично. Номер 901. Окна в две стороны, вид восхитительный. 
Но!!!! Интернета нет, от слова совсем!
Всю неделю сидел на мобильном.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Два минуса - первый : в номере не было ни одного окна, вообще. Второй это то что приносят завтрак в номер, и ты должен чуть ли не на коленках есть. В остальном нареканий нет, чисто, номер просторный, есть все необходимое. Расположение недалеко от пляжа

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Всё соответствовало ожиданиям
reviews.negatives: Решетка на окне

reviews.title: Хороший отель со своими приколами
reviews.positives: Приветливый персонал, очень красивый вид из отеля, хорошие завтраки. Уровень чистоты как везде в Азии, чисто но не от всей души, пятнышки, дырочки, капельки, но если вы не брезгливы, нормально.
reviews.negatives: Нет полотенца под ноги, положили одно из тех что для лица. После уборки нам заменили это полотенце на грязную тряпку. Намёк мы конечно поняли, посмеялись, но если честно это не очень правильное решение.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Место, спокойно, всё рядом, удобно
reviews.negatives: Мелкие бытовые мелочи, не закрывалась дверь в ванну, туалет в комнате, от школы рано утром шумно, занятия идут через громкоговоритель.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: За свои 8 долларов в сутки - замечательный отель.
reviews.negatives:
Чёрная плесень на вытяжке в душе.
Не мой мусор при заселении)
Детей слышно с 7:30 и раньше. Но поют хорошо)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Роскошный вид! В моём номере был вид одновременно и на море, и на горы с другой стороны, безумно красиво за такие деньги. Номер достаточно комфортный, каждый день приносили воду. За свои деньги хорошее место.
reviews.negatives: Кондиционер дует на кровать.

reviews.title: Шикарный панорамный вид, тихое место, хорошая цена.
reviews.positives: Отель с потрясающим видом, небольшой, но очень уютный номер, очень комфортное и тихое место. Девушка на ресепшен всячески пыталась помочь решить проблемы с неработающим сейфом, починить не получилось, но девушка принесла две бутылки воды, дабы скрасить недоразумение, очень мило с ее стороны) мы к вам вернёмся ещё, спасибо!
reviews.negatives: Нужно починить сейф и второй полотенцесушитель, не критично, но будет в разы комфортнее.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Небольшая уютная комната, в пешей доступности несколько хороших кафе. Останавливались всего на одну ночь, так что судить сложно.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Отличный, чистые номера, прекрасные виды, отличная цена.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Вид прекрасен
Чисто
reviews.negatives: Нет пандуса, тяжело нести багаж

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Хорошее расположение, персонал.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Хорошее расположение, удобно добираться до моря, рынка и т.д. рядом прокат байков( можно ставить в гараж отеля) много кафе, недалеко есть несколько банков. Персонал отеля приветливый. Убирают каждый день. Сначала смутило что нет окна в номере, но после поняли что оно и не нужно(лишний шум и тепло). В номере хороший кондиционер, телевизор, холодильник и сейф. Неплохой санузел и душ. В общем обязательно вернемся. 
 P/s кровать огромная.

reviews.title: Шикарный вид из окна😍😍😍
reviews.positives:
Замечательный отель.  Очень дружелюбный администратор.  
Номер шикарен 😍.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Расположение прекрасное, находится в центре но при этом очень тихо и уютно. Мы остановились на пару дней пока искали жилье в итоге продлили ещё на 3. Превосходное сочетание цена - качество.

reviews.title: Hotel bych určitě neohodnotila jako 3*, spíše 2* a méně. Je potřeba zapracovat na úklidu.
reviews.positives: Snídaně byla výborná, donesená na pokoj, je na výběr ze čtyř druhů snídaní a ze čtyř nápojů. Snídaně byla vždy donesena v čas, který byl domluven předchozí den. Komunikace s personálem byla také v pořádku, i když jsem se musela ptát z vlastní iniciativy, jak snídaně fungují. Zároveň wifi na druhém patře byla výborná, neměla jsem problém dívat se na filmy na Netflixu. Postel byla za mě pohodlná, tvrdší (ale to mně osobně vyhovuje) a také čistá.
reviews.negatives: Bohužel hned po příjezdu do pokoje byl cítit zápach, který se ale naštěstí dal vyvětrat, nicméně tak, že jsem musela mít otevřené dveře na chodbu - v pokoji totiž nebylo okno, ale myslím, že ve vyšších patrech okna jsou. Zároveň celková čistota pokoje byla tristní, neočekávala jsem žádný luxus, ale v koupelně byl prach a vlasy, kobereček před koupelnou byl velmi špinavý a ručníky, které měly být čisté, měly skvrny. Nicméně po dvou dnech mi byly vyměněny za nové a ty již byly čisté. Ve sprše tekla teplá voda až po 15 minutách odpuštění studené vody - velké plýtvání a kdybych si tuto informaci nepřečetla v jedné z recenzí, ani by mě nenapadlo odpouštět vodu tak dlouho.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Чисто
reviews.negatives: Под окном школа , где громко орут

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Mohli sme sa ubytovať už o 8 ráno čo bolo super.
Príjemný personál. Dobrá poloha. Pekná a čistá izba v ktorej bol pokoj a kľud. Odporúčam
We liked the location. It was a little out of town which was nice but still very close to the beach. The views of the mountains was absolutely beautiful.
reviews.negatives:
We really dislike leaving negative reviews but we think this is unfortunately fair. 
We found the staff to be a little un-accomodating with any requests, & I hate to say it, but a little rude. We had breakfast included which we requested a time for the breakfast (as they deliver the breakfast to your room). Every morning it was 1.5 hours earlier than we ask, which we were out or still asleep. Even when we discussed this with them they did the exact same thing the next morning. The pho would be cold so we couldn’t eat it anyway. 
Some of our laundry was lost also which we had to follow up. 
The room also needed a good clean, cockroaches under the chairs, bed sheets where not the correct size for the bed, floor really dirty etc. 

We also had a dispute as leaving, we are very certain we paid at the start (as of course you do in every accommodation). As we were checking out they said we didn’t pay. Unfortunately it was going off ‘he said she said’ in which we just paid again. We didn’t receive a receipt so I higher recommend getting a receipt as I feel we had paid twice. 

I really would love to see this hotel turn it around as I think it has so much potential.

reviews.title: It was okay
reviews.positives: Location is good for those who doesn’t wanna stay around crowds. Staff was welcoming and helpful. Comfy beds but the pillows are awful
reviews.negatives: Pretty small room, almost no window. Does not look like at the pictures at all. If you look at the picture you should imagine the place 30% smaller and 10 years older, this would give you some understanding of how it looks in reality

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: The location is good
reviews.negatives: Clea

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: They lock the door in the night, seen blood stains on the bedsheet but worth the price

reviews.title: Na Trang in general was disappointing for us compared with the other places we visited. The hotel me
reviews.positives: Helpful staff. Fairly close to beach front
reviews.negatives: Had to request move on arrival, as no window in original room. Room was a little small

reviews.title: Beautiful views of the sea and mountains if you take the Suite, just wish the AC was serviced and broken parts and thing
reviews.positives: Well located in upper part of the city. The room we took, the suite, had a very beautiful view and had an incredible sunrise in the morning.
reviews.negatives: The AC was not very strong and took hours to heat up the room. Shower head was hanging with a hair tie, quite unprofessional for a suite. Overall okay if you’re on a budget. The bed is also not the softest.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Good location
reviews.negatives: The bed not comfortable

reviews.title: Bright, spacious, overpriced room on a noisy street
reviews.positives: A bright, spacious room, with a good view
reviews.negatives: Street noise, poor soundproofing

reviews.title: Please add information about only cash payment policy in your first message after booking is confirmed
reviews.positives: I love the location - it’s close to the beach area, but also in a quiet neighborhood, rooms are cleaned everyday, staff is very helpful and nice! Great price as well :)
reviews.negatives: Wi-Fi was very slow, I only used mobile data to work

reviews.title: Overall enjoyed my stay here.
reviews.positives:
This hotel is in a fantastic location, situated on a wide main road that is surprisingly quiet and free from heavy traffic. It’s just a short walk to the beach. There’s also a lovely coffee shop nearby, ideal for a morning coffee or a relaxing break, and a few local food vendors. The neighborhood is peaceful and well-kept, adding to the overall charm of the stay.

The rooms are spacious enough to feel comfortable, with a mountain view. They were clean and well-maintained, providing everything I needed for a relaxing stay. The staff was friendly and could speak some English.
reviews.negatives: The building itself is a bit old. Additionally, there’s a school located right next to the hotel, which can get quite noisy in the mornings for about 20 minutes during drop-off and assembly time.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Very spacious room and clean

reviews.title: It was nice place after 2 flights and long bus trip
reviews.positives: Location, cozy atmosphere
reviews.negatives: Need to wait a hot water in shower. The bed consists of two mattresses that move apart on different sides. the bed is simply divided in half into two mattresses

reviews.title: Good but a bit noisy in the mornings.
reviews.positives:
- Great view.
- Big room. 
- Short walk to the beach. 
- Parking downstairs. 
- Staff is okay.
reviews.negatives:
- Weak wifi in the evenings.
- There is a facility nearby, I think it’s a school, whose staff start giving a lecture through a loud speaker, from about 7 am every morning. So if you plan to wake up later, you will still wake up at 7 am, even in ear plugs :)

reviews.title: Mixed
reviews.positives: Everything good with the hotel itself though the bed was too hard but that is common in Vietnam
reviews.negatives: When I came to pay with my Visa card apparently they don't take cards.... according to the email I received they did. I was relying on that. So I had to take money from an ATM and was charged 45000 vnd to do so. That charge effectively added almost 20% to my room bill. As my trip was nearing the end I had intended to use my remaining cash sparingly and not use an ATM again. Very disappointed. For some reason the girl didn't want to give me a receipt and I had to insist. Not good. If you bear all the foregoing in mind it's still a good hotel, just be aware about card use.

reviews.title: If you like quiet, this is the best choice
reviews.positives: The golden lift, early check ins. Responsive hosts
reviews.negatives: Dated decor and room is small

reviews.title: Hotel on top floors with excellent views
reviews.positives: The room was good sizedwith excellent views.
reviews.negatives: No tea and coffee although it had a kettle.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very clean and silent
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: A good room for an overnight stay. A wonderful view of the mountains. The room itself is quite large, with a large balcony.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.negatives: Air conditioner and extractor fan needed cleaning

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Everything very good, especially the view

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Would highly recommend this accommodation. The staff are very friendly and helpful. The location is great. View from the room brilliant. Thanks to all the staff for a great stay.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Great hotel, very friendly and supportive staff
